command:
amplihack copilot --allow-all-tools -p '# Step 2c: Resolve Any Remaining Ambiguity
**Task:** Scaffold the TypeScript monorepo foundation for the agent-kgpacks TypeScript port, following docs/PLAN.md (Phase 0 foundations). Deliver: (1) a pnpm workspaces monorepo targeting Node 22 LTS with strict TypeScript ESM, a shared base tsconfig, eslint + prettier, and vitest configured at the root; (2) buildable package skeletons under packages/ for @kgpacks/db, @kgpacks/embeddings, @kgpacks/agent, @kgpacks/query, @kgpacks/packs, @kgpacks/backend, @kgpacks/cli, @kgpacks/mcp, @kgpacks/eval — each with package.json, src/index.ts placeholder, tsconfig extending the base, and a short README stub describing its responsibility per docs/PLAN.md; (3) in @kgpacks/db add @ladybugdb/core as a pinned dependency and implement a minimal Database/Connection wrapper plus a Spike A vitest smoke test that creates an in-memory LadybugDB, runs INSTALL/LOAD EXTENSION VECTOR, creates a small FLOAT vector node table and HNSW index via CREATE_VECTOR_INDEX, and runs QUERY_VECTOR_INDEX asserting correct cosine-ranked nearest-neighbor results; (4) a GitHub Actions CI workflow running install, typecheck, lint, and vitest, plus a python-free guard step that fails if any runtime package declares or invokes a Python dependency; (5) ensure '"'"'pnpm install && pnpm -r build && pnpm -r test'"'"' passes locally. Keep it minimal and idiomatic; implement no business logic beyond the Spike A smoke test. Commit the work on a feature branch and open a pull request against main.
**Clarified Requirements:** {"acceptance_criteria":["Fresh checkout: '"'"'pnpm install'"'"' succeeds with a committed lockfile (pnpm-lock.yaml).","'"'"'pnpm -r build'"'"' (tsc per package) compiles all 9 packages with zero TypeScript errors under strict mode.","'"'"'pnpm -r test'"'"' runs Vitest; the @kgpacks/db Spike A test passes, asserting correct cosine-ranked nearest-neighbor ordering from QUERY_VECTOR_INDEX.","Typecheck and lint (eslint) and format-check (prettier) all pass at the root.","All 9 packages exist under packages/ with package.json (name '"'"'@kgpacks/<name>'"'"'), src/index.ts, tsconfig extending the base, and a README stub matching its PLAN.md responsibility.","@kgpacks/db'"'"'s package.json pins @ladybugdb/core to an exact version (no ^/~ range) and the version resolves/installs.","CI workflow file under .github/workflows runs install -> typecheck -> lint -> test and is green; the python-free guard job fails the build if a runtime package introduces a Python dependency, and passes for the current tree.","A feature branch is pushed and a PR is opened against main referencing this work.","No business logic is present beyond the Spike A smoke test (placeholders only in other packages)."],"assumptions":["This step delivers the foundational, in-memory variant of Spike A (vector index smoke test); the full '"'"'open an existing pack + concurrency'"'"' Spike A from PLAN.md is a later task.","@ladybugdb/core ships prebuilt binaries for the CI/runner platform (linux x64), so the native binding installs without a build toolchain; latest 0.17.x is acceptable unless exact 0.15.x storage parity is later required.","Per-package builds use tsc emitting to dist/ with declaration files; ESM module resolution is NodeNext/Node16.","The '"'"'python-free guard'"'"' is a scripted CI check that scans runtime package manifests/sources for Python deps/invocations (e.g. python/pip/.py spawns) and exits non-zero on a hit.","Vitest runs once at the root across the workspace (or via '"'"'pnpm -r test'"'"'); the existing '"'"'pnpm -r test'"'"' command in the acceptance line is satisfied by per-package test scripts.","Node 22 LTS and a recent pnpm (v9+) are the target toolchain; engines and packageManager fields are pinned accordingly.","GitHub Copilot SDK / @ladybugdb extension downloads needed at install/test time are available in the CI environment.","Feature branch naming and PR can follow a sensible default (e.g. feat/phase-0-monorepo-scaffold) since none was specified."],"classification":"feature","estimated_complexity":"medium","explicit_requirements":["pnpm workspaces monorepo targeting Node 22 LTS (engines pinned), modules as ESM ('"'"'type'"'"':'"'"'module'"'"'), TypeScript in strict mode.","Shared base tsconfig (e.g. tsconfig.base.json) at the root with strict + ESM/NodeNext settings; every package tsconfig extends it.","Root-level ESLint + Prettier configuration and Vitest configuration.","Buildable package skeletons under packages/ for exactly these 9 packages: @kgpacks/db, @kgpacks/embeddings, @kgpacks/agent, @kgpacks/query, @kgpacks/packs, @kgpacks/backend, @kgpacks/cli, @kgpacks/mcp, @kgpacks/eval.","Each package has: package.json, src/index.ts placeholder, a tsconfig that extends the base, and a short README stub describing its responsibility per docs/PLAN.md.","@kgpacks/db declares @ladybugdb/core as a pinned (exact-version) dependency.","@kgpacks/db implements a minimal Database/Connection wrapper over @ladybugdb/core (open DB, get connection, run query, load extension).","Spike A vitest smoke test in @kgpacks/db that: creates an in-memory LadybugDB; runs INSTALL/LOAD EXTENSION VECTOR; creates a node table holding a small FLOAT[] vector column; inserts a few rows; builds an HNSW index via CREATE_VECTOR_INDEX; runs QUERY_VECTOR_INDEX and asserts the returned nearest neighbors are correctly cosine-ranked.","GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs dependency install, typecheck, lint, and vitest across the workspace.","CI includes a python-free guard step that fails if any runtime package declares or invokes a Python dependency.","'"'"'pnpm install && pnpm -r build && pnpm -r test'"'"' passes locally (and in CI).","Keep it minimal/idiomatic; implement NO business logic beyond the Spike A smoke test.","Commit the work on a feature branch and open a pull request against main."],"out_of_scope":["Phase 1+ business logic for any package (no real query pipeline, agent/Copilot SDK calls, backend routes, CLI commands, MCP tools, eval runner, or embeddings implementation).","The @kgpacks/ingestion package and the frontend migration (Phase 2 / later phases).","Spikes B (embedding pooling parity), C (Copilot SDK throughput), and D (cross-encoder ONNX).","Reading a real existing pack DB, FTS/graph query coverage, and the concurrency-model investigation portion of the full PLAN.md Spike A (this step does the reduced in-memory vector smoke test only).","Parity harness, Python oracle/fixture exporter, and golden fixtures.","The walking-skeleton end-to-end vertical slice.","Publishing packages, release tooling, Docker/deploy images, or merging the PR."],"questions_resolved":["Spike A scope: interpreted as the in-memory FLOAT-vector + HNSW (CREATE_VECTOR_INDEX/QUERY_VECTOR_INDEX) cosine-NN smoke test described in THIS task, not the full existing-pack/concurrency Spike A in PLAN.md.","Package set: scaffold exactly the 9 listed @kgpacks packages now; ingestion and frontend are deferred.","@ladybugdb/core version: pin to a single exact version (default latest 0.17.x) for reproducibility; 0.15.x only if exact storage parity is mandated later.","'"'"'pinned dependency'"'"' interpreted as an exact semver (no caret/tilde) plus committed lockfile.","'"'"'python-free guard'"'"' interpreted as a CI job that statically inspects runtime packages for Python deps/invocations and fails on detection.","Build tool: plain tsc per package (no bundler) is sufficient for buildable skeletons.","Test framework wiring satisfies both '"'"'vitest configured at root'"'"' and per-package '"'"'pnpm -r test'"'"'."],"task_summary":"Scaffold a Python-free pnpm/Node 22 TypeScript ESM monorepo (Phase 0 foundations) with 9 buildable @kgpacks package skeletons, a minimal @kgpacks/db LadybugDB wrapper plus an in-memory Spike A vector-index smoke test, root tooling (tsconfig/eslint/prettier/vitest), and CI (install/typecheck/lint/test + python-free guard), then open a PR."}

## Progress: Phase 4/4 — Synthesizing findings

# Codebase Context Summary

## 1. Relevant existing code and patterns
This is a **greenfield repository** — there is no TypeScript, no build tooling, and no source code yet. The entire tree is:
- `README.md` — states "early scaffolding"; declares the no-Python-runtime constraint and the LadybugDB + GitHub Copilot SDK stack.
- `docs/PLAN.md` (343 lines) — the **authoritative spec**. Phase 0 (lines 179–216) defines exactly this task: scaffold pnpm monorepo, strict ESM tsconfig, eslint/prettier, vitest, CI; pin `@ladybugdb/core` + lockfile; Spike A (DB vector smoke test).
- `LICENSE` (MIT), `.gitignore` (already ignores `node_modules/`, `dist/`, `coverage/`, `*.tsbuildinfo`, `*.lbug/`, `*.kuzu/`, `*.wal`).
- `.claude/runtime/*` — launcher/session artifacts (currently git-staged; **not part of the deliverable** — avoid committing these in the feature work).

**Package responsibilities are fully specified** in PLAN.md lines 94–104 — use these verbatim for the 9 README stubs. There are **no existing patterns to match**; conventions will be set by this scaffold.

## 2. Files that will likely need creation/modification
Nothing existing needs *modification* (except possibly README to drop "early scaffolding"). All work is **net-new**:
- Root: `package.json`, `pnpm-workspace.yaml`, `tsconfig.base.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `.eslintrc`/`eslint.config.js`, `.prettierrc`, `vitest.config.ts`, `pnpm-lock.yaml`, `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, python-free guard script (e.g. `scripts/check-no-python.mjs`).
- `packages/<name>/` × 9 (`db, embeddings, agent, query, packs, backend, cli, mcp, eval`): each `package.json`, `src/index.ts`, `tsconfig.json` (extends base), `README.md`.
- `packages/db/`: `@ladybugdb/core` wrapper (Database/Connection) + `src/*.test.ts` Spike A.

## 3. Dependencies and integration points
- **Toolchain (verified locally):** Node **v24.1.0** installed (task targets Node 22 LTS — pin `engines`/CI to 22; v24 will still run locally). **pnpm not installed** but **corepack 0.32.0 is available** — enable via `corepack`. npm 11.3.0, git 2.51.0.
- **`@ladybugdb/core` — confirmed on npm, latest `0.17.1`** (network access works). PLAN.md Open Decisions (lines 336–337) recommends pinning **0.15.x for exact storage parity** but accepts **0.17.x validated forward-read**; clarified requirements default to **exact 0.17.1** (no `^`/`~`). Storage-compat proven (PLAN lines 84–88). Note the heavy `apache-arrow` transitive dep (PLAN line 305).
- **Spike A integration:** `INSTALL/LOAD EXTENSION VECTOR` requires **network at test time** to fetch the extension (PLAN line 293) — relevant for CI. In-memory DB, `CREATE_VECTOR_INDEX` (HNSW) + `QUERY_VECTOR_INDEX`, assert cosine-ranked NN order.
- **Deferred deps (do NOT add now):** Transformers.js, `@github/copilot-sdk`, Fastify, MCP SDK, commander — these belong to Phase 1+.

## 4. Potential conflicts and considerations
- **Python-free guard:** PLAN lines 23–33, 64–65 make this a first-class DoD item. Guard must scan **runtime** package manifests/sources for Python deps or `.py`/`pip`/`python` spawns and fail CI. Python is allowed dev-time (parity oracle) — so scope the guard to runtime packages only (none exist yet, so it should pass on the current tree).
- **ESM strictness:** `"type": "module"` everywhere + `NodeNext`/`Node16` resolution means relative imports need explicit `.js` extensions in emitted code — a common first-build trip-up under strict mode.
- **Node version skew:** local Node 24 vs pinned 22 — keep `engines` non-fatal or use `engine-strict=false` locally; CI uses 22.
- **`@ladybugdb/core` maturity** is flagged as the biggest external bet (PLAN 294–300): pin exact + commit lockfile; expect possible native-binary/prebuild quirks on linux-x64 CI.
- **Extension download in CI** could be a flake source for Spike A — ensure the runner has network egress.
- **`.claude/runtime/` staged files** are unrelated session state; exclude them from the feature commit/PR.
- **Scope discipline:** clarified requirements forbid any business logic beyond Spike A — keep the other 8 packages as `index.ts` placeholders only.

This is a clean-slate scaffold; the only real integration risk is the `@ladybugdb/core` native binding + VECTOR extension behavior exercised by Spike A.

- Explain rationale

- Proceed with confidence
Output final, unambiguous requirements ready for design phase.
